title: AI wave is almost a tsunami: Kanwal Rekhi says wealth creation has gone nuclear
description: Having witnessed every major technology cycle since the birth of Silicon Valley, the Inventus Capital Partners co-founder says artificial intelligence is creating a self-reinforcing cycle of innovation, capital and unprecedented wealth generation.
content:
Having witnessed every major technology cycle since the birth of Silicon Valley, the Inventus Capital Partners co-founder says artificial intelligence is creating a self-reinforcing cycle of innovation, capital and unprecedented wealth generation.

title: The chatbot that learned to speak Filipino
description: WAITING days to hear back from customer service has become a frustrating reality for many Filipinos. Too often, customers are met with robotic chatbot replies, confusing answers, and endless loops with no real human support. Skyro believes digital customer care could be better. So the Securities and Exchange Commission-registered financial technology company built “Sky,” an artificial intelligence (AI) chatbot designed to serve as the first line of customer support, responding to concerns within one minute, 24/7.
content: WAITING days to hear back from customer service has become a frustrating reality for many Filipinos. Too often, customers are met with robotic chatbot replies, confusing answers, and endless loops with no real human support. Skyro believes digital cu... [2933 chars]

title: US Official Says AI Has No Place in OECD Digital Tax Talks
description: Artificial intelligence doesn’t belong in the OECD-led discussions about taxing the digital economy, the top US delegate to the organization said Tuesday.
content:
Artificial intelligence doesn’t belong in the OECD-led discussions about taxing the digital economy, the top US delegate to the organization said Tuesday.
Rebecca Burch, deputy assistant secretary for international affairs at the Treasury Department,... [380 chars]

title: AI companies should release environmental impact, says UN chief
description: United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres is calling on artificial intelligence companies to release information about the carbon, water and land used to power their systems.
content:
By ALEXA ST. JOHN
United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres on Tuesday called on artificial intelligence companies to release information about the carbon pollution they create, along with the water and land used to power their operations.
